data.title: Bitcoin Falls to $81K After Trump's Tariffs—Is a Violent Reversal Coming?
Elizabeth Warren Says Congress Has 'Power To Pull Our Economy Back' From The Brink As Don Bacon Moves To Limit Trump's Tariff Power: 'Need A Handful Of Republicans Not To Bend A Knee'
data.description: Elizabeth Warren urged Congress—particularly a few Republicans—to resist Trump's influence and act swiftly to prevent economic turmoil, warning of a repeat of the 2008 crisis.

data.title: Trump's 104% Tariff On Chinese Imports Sends Stock Futures Plunging — Dow Falls Over 500 Points
data.description: Stock futures tumbled on Tuesday evening as markets braced for President Donald Trump's 104% tariff on Chinese imports taking effect at 12:01 a.m. ET Wednesday, erasing a brief relief rally and sending major indexes to significant lows.

data.title: Meta Restricts Live Streaming For Teens Under 16 As Part Of Expanded Safety Measures
data.description: Meta Platforms announced new restrictions for teen users, prohibiting those under 16 from live streaming on Instagram without parental permission, as the company expands its Teen Account protections across its platforms.

data.title: FatPipe Stock Rips 126% On Nasdaq Debut Before Paring Some Gains After-Hours
data.description: FatPipe shares skyrocketed 126.08% to $13.00 from their initial public offering price of $5.75 per share during their Nasdaq debut, before sliding 20.77% to $10.30 in after-hours trading.
